message:
🌱 opentelemetry-operator: [collector] Specify the collector's configuration with structure yaml instead (#1872)

* 🌱 Add opentelemetry-operator: [collector] Specify the collector's configuration with mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-operator-1707-collector-specify-the-collector-s-configuration-with",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry-operator: [collector] Specify the collector's configuration with structure yaml instead of a string",
+    "description": "[collector] Specify the collector's configuration with structure yaml instead of a string. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentelemetry-operator deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentelemetry-operator version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nhelm list -n opentelemetry-operator 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentelemetry-operator installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry-operator configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-operator configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-operator\n```\nCurrently the only way to define the collector's config in the `OpentlemetryCollector` resource is via a string in the `Spec.Config` field."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [collector] Specify the collector's configuration with…",
+        "description": "It breaks this step down into two smaller changes.\n1. Providing an internal structure that could be used to operate on, but still provides you a string representation if needed. (That way you do not need to touch all the functionality that is build on top. Like the config validation or the mods done for the targetAllocator).\n2. Changing it on all the places we benefit from a native yaml representation. (This can result in multiple tasks and way smaller PRs then having all in one)\n\nI have not\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry-operator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[collector] Specify the collector's configuration with…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "It breaks this step down into two smaller changes.\n1. Providing an internal structure that could be used to operate on, but still provides you a string representation if needed. (That way you do not need to touch all the functionality that is build on top. Like the config validation or the mods done for the targetAllocator).\n2.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentelemetry-operator",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentelemetry-operator"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/issues/1707",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-operator installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:49:38.056Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}

+{

+    "description": "[collector] Specify the collector's configuration with structure yaml instead of a string. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",

+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentelemetry-operator deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentelemetry-operator version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nhelm list -n opentelemetry-operator 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentelemetry-operator installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry-operator configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-operator configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-operator\n```\nCurrently the only way to define the collector's config in the `OpentlemetryCollector` resource is via a string in the `Spec.Config` field."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [collector] Specify the collector's configuration with…",
+        "description": "I'm not quite sure I understand the outcome of this discussion. But here is my take :snail: \n\nWe can overwrite the [collector's internal config structure](https://pkg.go.dev/go.opentelemetry.io/collector.76.1/otelcol#Config) Unmarshal method and support a native yaml configuration as well as parsing a single string into the same structure. This should be done during the validation process in the webhook.\nTo avoid rewriting logic on everyplace the current string field is used, we might add a\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry-operator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[collector] Specify the collector's configuration with…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I'm not quite sure I understand the outcome of this discussion. But here is my take :snail: \n\nWe can overwrite the [collector's internal config structure](https://pkg.go.dev/go.opentelemetry.io/collector.76.1/otelcol#Config) Unmarshal method and support a native yaml configuration as well as parsing a single string into the same structure.",

+    }
